title: select_with_fee convergence loop: correct iterative fee-aware coin selection
description: tx_builder.rs:527-576: select_with_fee uses a convergence loop rather than a two-pass approach. This correctly handles the case where selecting more notes (to cover a higher fee) increases the fee further. The loop is provably terminating (zip317_fee is monotone-non-decreasing, finitely many notes → InsufficientFunds or convergence). A contributor might suggest simplifying to a single-pass or two-pass approach, but both fail when the fee tier boundary is crossed by the initial note selection. The loop is the correct algorithm.
